summary: A stainless steel crown should be used due to its durability and ability to resist caries progression despite the low horizontal overlap between the maxillary central incisors. This ensures long-term protection while addressing the main concern effectively. \(\boxed{\text{Stainless Steel Crown}}\) Summary: For a patient with a high caries index and minimal horizontal overlap of maxillary central incisors, a stainless steel crown is recommended as it provides necessary durability and prevents additional damage from cavities. Despite aesthetic concerns being secondary here, this type of crown best meets the functional requirements needed by the patient. \(\boxed{\text{Stainless Steel Crown}}\)
